# FERC Form 1 Audit Explorer

> Machine-readable findings of noncompliance and staff recommendations from FERC's published **Form 1 (electric utility)** audit reports (Office of Enforcement, Division of Audits & Accounting). Covers both financial (FA) and non-financial (PA) audits of electric utilities, ISOs, and RTOs. Each report is parsed into findings -> recommendations, and cross-report themes are mined.

Scope: FERC Form 1 (electric) audits — gas (Form 2) and oil (Form 6) audits are out of scope for now. As of 2026-05-22, 53 electric reports are structured (53 electric audits identified of 71 total audits listed). Findings and recommendations are quoted verbatim from each report's Executive Summary. Primary source: https://www.ferc.gov/audits. Independent public-interest tool, not affiliated with FERC. Links below are relative to the site root.

## Data (machine-readable)
- [Reports](data/reports.json): every structured report with findings, recommendations, and themes
- [Patterns](data/patterns.json): cross-report themes with counts by industry and year
- [Meta](data/meta.json): corpus counts and provenance
- [Full corpus text](llms-full.txt): all findings and recommendations in one file (verbatim)

## Reports
- [Pacific Gas and Electric Company](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250918-3011&optimized=false): Docket FA23-8-000, issued 2025-09-18, financial audit, transmission/distribution, 8 finding(s) — findings: Allocation of Overhead Costs to CWIP; Accounting for Operating and Maintenance Expenses; Accounting for Administrative and General Expenses; Accounting for Compromise Settlements; Allowance for Funds Used During Construction; Accounting for Customer Advances; Prepayments; FERC Form No. 1 Reporting
- [Talen Energy](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250908-3009&optimized=false): Docket PA22-7-000, issued 2025-09-08, non-financial audit, generation, 3 finding(s) — findings: Generation Outage Requests Submitted to PJM’s electronic Dispatcher Application Reporting Tool (eDART) System; Generation Outage Reporting in Generating Availability Data System (GADS); Discrepancies between Reported Generator Outages and Offer Schedules
- [Alabama Power Company](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250903-3001&optimized=false): Docket PA24-5-000, issued 2025-09-03, non-financial audit, generation/transmission, 5 finding(s) — findings: Acquisition-Related Expenses; Acquisition-Related Internal Labor; Accounting for Lobbying Expenses; Account Misclassifications; Accounting for Edison Electric Institute Membership Dues
- [Duke Energy Progress, LLC](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250725-3010&optimized=false): Docket FA23-6-000, issued 2025-07-25, financial audit, generation/transmission, 11 finding(s) — findings: Recovery of Fuel Contract Buyout Costs; Accounting for Fuel Storage and Handling; Wholesale Revenue Credits; Auxiliary Fuel Costs in Nuclear Power Generation; Allowance for Funds Used During Construction; Accounting for Distribution and Meter-Related Costs; Accounting for Political Activities; Accounting for Steam Maintenance Expenses; Accounting for A&G Overheads and Accruals; FERC Form No. 580 Reporting; FERC Form Nos. 1 and 3-Q Reporting
- [Portland General Electric Company](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20250616-3008&optimized=false): Docket PA23-10-000, issued 2025-06-16, non-financial audit, generation/transmission, 11 finding(s) — findings: Public Access to Monthly and Yearly Capability Information; Narrative Explanations for ATC Unavailability; Deviation Information for Generator Interconnection Studies; Interconnection Request List Study Availability; Preservation of Records; Quarterly Generator Interconnection Service Metrics; Quarterly Transmission Service Metrics Reports and Study Costs; Listing of Transmission Service Request Completed Studies; Posting of Short Circuit Information; Transmission Planning Study Cycle Meetings; Posting of Transmission Planning Content

- [Alliant Energy Corporate Services, Inc.](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/eLibrary/filelist?accession_number=20241127-3007&optimized=false): Docket FA23-7-000, issued 2024-11-27, financial audit, generation, 4 finding(s) — findings: Service Company Allocation Factors; Accounting for Lobbying Expenses; Electric Vehicle Charging Stations; Accounting for Donations

## Common themes
- Accounting misclassification: 31 report(s), 104 finding(s)
- Form reporting (Form No. 1/2/6, Page 700): 28 report(s), 57 finding(s)
- AFUDC / cost of capital: 18 report(s), 27 finding(s)
- Depreciation: 15 report(s), 25 finding(s)
- Below-the-line costs (lobbying, charitable, etc.): 12 report(s), 15 finding(s)
- Capitalization vs. expense: 12 report(s), 13 finding(s)
- Property & plant records: 11 report(s), 13 finding(s)
- Informational postings: 8 report(s), 13 finding(s)
- Affiliate / intercompany transactions: 8 report(s), 11 finding(s)
- Cost of service & rates: 5 report(s), 6 finding(s)
- Membership dues & industry associations: 4 report(s), 4 finding(s)
- Tariff administration & oversight: 3 report(s), 3 finding(s)

## Optional
- [Human-readable explorer](index.html)
- [FERC audit reports (primary source)](https://www.ferc.gov/audits)
